metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: Action command — feed with no args shows the feed, not introspection
Action command — catchup with no args shows missed activity
Action command — activity with no args shows recent activity
Action command — welcome with no args generates welcome post
Action command — digest with no args shows 24h digest
Action command — prompt/event with no args generates content
Action command — search requires query arg but log does not
Action command — explore with no args discovers hints
Action command — leaderboard with no args shows rankings
Identity utility module — not a user-facing command
False positive — [yellow] section header in help text, not a warning message
main() depth 5 — app initialization flow: ensure_database, discover_modules, route_command. Legitimate entry point control flow.
format_time_ago() depth 5 — tight utility with try/except + if/elif for time delta calculation. Single purpose.
_relative_time() depth 4 — utility for timestamp formatting. Duplicate of feed_ops format_time_ago but tightly scoped.
_set_notification_level() depth 5 — shared notification logic (watch/mute/track). Private helper, tight coupling justified.
create_post() depth 4 — multi-step workflow (parse args, validate room, insert, mentions, sync FTS, increment count). High cohesion.
_parse_search_args() depth 5 — tightly scoped flag parsing loop. Private utility correctly extracted from run_search.
add_comment() depth 4 — multi-step workflow (parse, validate, dedup, insert, update counts, mentions, FTS). High cohesion.
retry_on_locked() depth 4 — resilient retry pattern for SQLite locking. Correct module location, well-encapsulated.
aggregate_branch_stats() depth 4 — aggregation loop over branches with per-branch error handling. Appropriate structure.

notes.usage: Add entries to 'bypass' list to exclude specific violations

example.reason: Circular dependency - logger cannot import CLI

fields.standard: Standard name: cli, imports, naming, etc. (required)
fields.lines: Optional - specific line numbers to bypass
